title: CANDLELIGHTERS FOR CHILDREN WITH CANCER - 211info
text: CANDLELIGHTERS FOR CHILDREN WITH CANCER CANDLELIGHTERS FOR CHILDREN WITH CANCER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides practical and emotional support services to children and their families who have been affected by childhood cancer. Families are served from diagnosis through treatment, and bereavement through monthly support groups, family activities and events, teen groups, emergency funds, scholarships, and food pantries and meal programs at local hospitals. 10070 SW Beaverton-Hillsdale Highway Suite 360 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Children ages 0-21 who currently have or have had cancer and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 719-4244 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 719-4244 Main phone Main phone (503) 719-4244 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Advocacy * Disabilities Issues Bereaved Parent Support Groups * Families/Friends of People with Cancer Camps * Families/Friends of People with Cancer General Health Education Programs * Cancer General Recreational Activities/Sports * Families/Friends of People with Cancer Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Cancer If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
